description: Divorce document in Arabic script. Wife: ʿAzīza the freedwoman (mawlāt) of ʿAlī b. Muḥammad b. ʿAllān. Husband: Ismāʿīl b. [...] al-Iskandarānī. Dated: 20 Jumādā I 412 AH = 1 September 1021 CE. There are at least two witness signatures; the first is of [...] b. ʿAlī b. Sahlūn.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
